meta.lastUpdated: After Round 2 · R3 In Progress · U.S. Open · 2026-06-20

prizes.label: Overall Pool Champion
prizes.desc: Most cumulative earnings, all four majors

prizes.label: Group Champion
prizes.desc: Most cumulative earnings within your group of 8

participants.name: Arif Nuraney
participants.blurb: Rory made the cut at even par, Gotterup is T60, Ben Griffin T34. Min Woo Lee and Harris English both missed the cut. Aaron Rai not in field. Still commanding the lead.

participants.name: Matt Cavelti
participants.blurb: Scheffler T11, Tyrrell Hatton T34. Harris English and Si Woo Kim both missed the cut. Aaron Rai not in field. Still safely in second overall.

participants.name: Kevin Young
participants.blurb: Sam Burns T7, Kurt Kitayama T34, Rory T11. Brooks Koepka and Min Woo Lee both missed the cut. Russell Henley made it at T46 but needs a big weekend.

participants.name: Ali Pejman
participants.blurb: Wyndham Clark leads the tournament at -7. Rory T11, Tyrrell Hatton T34, Corey Conners T22. Brooks Koepka and Cam Smith both missed the cut. This could be Ali's US Open.

participants.name: Adam Hill
participants.blurb: Rory T11. Jason Day WD, Adam Scott and Daniel Berger both missed the cut. Hideki Matsuyama T60, Russell Henley T46. Three of six either gone or struggling.

participants.name: Michael O'Callaghan
participants.blurb: Rory T11, Tyrrell Hatton T34. Viktor Hovland, Si Woo Kim and Nick Taylor all missed the cut. Half the card is done for the week.

participants.name: Jeff Williams
participants.blurb: Rory T11, Corey Conners T22, Keegan Bradley T22. Patrick Cantlay and Viktor Hovland missed the cut. Max Homa not in field. Three live horses is better than most.

participants.name: Jamie MacDougall
participants.blurb: Rory T11 and Brian Harman T11. JJ Spaun, Adam Scott both missed the cut. Marco Penge not in field. Rory and Harman need to do a lot of work.

participants.name: Chris Cooper
participants.blurb: Scheffler T11, Sahith Theegala T7. Jon Rahm, Brooks Koepka and Min Woo Lee all missed the cut. Sungjae Im T34. Scheffler and Theegala carry the weight.

participants.name: Phil Kuzyk
participants.blurb: Scheffler T11, Sam Burns T7. Brooks Koepka missed the cut badly at +10. Robert MacIntyre T60, Matsuyama T60. Max Homa not in field.

participants.name: Tom Edstrand
participants.blurb: JT T7, Scheffler T11, Theegala T7, Kitayama T34, Spieth T46. Viktor Hovland missed the cut. Four of six inside the top 50 heading into the weekend.

participants.name: Rob Pettit
participants.blurb: JT T7, Justin Rose T22, Tyrrell Hatton T34. Patrick Reed, Adam Scott and Nick Taylor all missed the cut. Three solid horses still running.

participants.name: Jimmy Richmond
participants.blurb: Jon Rahm missed the cut at +6. Ludvig Aberg T22, Matsuyama T60, Spieth T46, Bridgeman T60. Jake Knapp missed the cut. Aberg needs to be your hero now.

participants.name: Sean Monahan
participants.blurb: JT T7, Scheffler T11. Jason Day WD, Jake Knapp missed the cut. Robert MacIntyre T60, Ryan Fox T46. The top two are doing the work — the rest is noise.

participants.name: Chris Kleaman
participants.blurb: Justin Rose T22, Cameron Young T34, Ben Griffin T34, Russell Henley T46. Harris English missed the cut. Jacob Bridgeman T60. Four players in the mix heading into R3.

participants.name: Phil Kinninmont
participants.blurb: Matt Fitzpatrick T2, Sam Burns T7, Ben Griffin T34, Gary Woodland T11, Gotterup T60. Jon Rahm missed the cut. One of the best cards left standing in the bottom half.

participants.name: Mike Richmond
participants.blurb: Xander Schauffele T2, Maverick McNealy T11, Ludvig Aberg T22, Russell Henley T46. Sepp Straka and Alex Noren both missed the cut. Three legitimate contenders — a strong US Open.

participants.name: Gareth McDonnell
participants.blurb: Xander T2, Justin Rose T22, Tyrrell Hatton T34. Shane Lowry missed the cut. Marco Penge and Aldrich Potgieter not in field. Three solid players still playing.

participants.name: Jon Greyell
participants.blurb: Scheffler T11, Keegan Bradley T22. Patrick Cantlay, Si Woo Kim and Nick Taylor all missed the cut. Viktor Hovland also gone. Scheffler is your entire season.

participants.name: Jay Barre
participants.blurb: Justin Rose T22, Cameron Young T34, Maverick McNealy T11, Gotterup T60. Ryan Gerard missed the cut. Jacob Bridgeman T60. Three players with weekend upside.

participants.name: Sean Fairburn
participants.blurb: Matt Fitzpatrick T2, Sam Burns T7, Ben Griffin T34, Russell Henley T46. Patrick Reed and Nicolai Hojgaard both missed the cut. Four live players — one of the better cards at this stage.

participants.name: Rod Armstrong
participants.blurb: Sam Burns T7, Ludvig Aberg T22, Corey Conners T22, Robert MacIntyre T60. Jon Rahm missed the cut. Ryan Fox T46. The Spaniard let you down — the Swede and the Canadian are picking up the slack.

participants.name: Nils Edstrand
participants.blurb: Scheffler T11, Keegan Bradley T22, Brian Harman T11. Bryson, Alex Noren and Harris English all missed the cut. The hex on Bryson continues — at least Scheffler and Harman showed up.

participants.name: Hans Edstrand
participants.blurb: Xander T2, Collin Morikawa 6th, Kurt Kitayama T34. Cam Smith, Alex Noren and Nick Taylor all missed the cut. Hans has the two best players left standing — this US Open could move the needle.

participants.name: David Rose
participants.blurb: Sam Burns T7, Gotterup T60, Ryo Hisatsune T11. Jon Rahm, Nicolai Hojgaard and Sepp Straka all missed the cut. Rahm's 78 in R2 was the gut punch that ended the tournament.

participants.name: Dino Konasewich
participants.blurb: Justin Rose T22, Cameron Young T34, Maverick McNealy T11. Shane Lowry, JJ Spaun and Rasmus Hojgaard all missed the cut. Three players still alive with real upside.

participants.name: Kit Matkaluk
participants.blurb: JT T7, Cameron Young T34, Gotterup T60, Bridgeman T60. Patrick Cantlay missed the cut. Marco Penge not in field. JT is the horse — everyone else is a footnote.

participants.name: David Puddicombe
participants.blurb: Jon Rahm CUT. Bryson DeChambeau CUT. Jason Day WD. Patrick Reed CUT. Sepp Straka CUT. Daniel Berger CUT. All six are gone — a historic US Open shutout. The Open Championship cannot come soon enough.

participants.name: Craig Langdon
participants.blurb: Collin Morikawa 6th, Ludvig Aberg T22, Brian Harman T11, Gary Woodland T11, Russell Henley T46. Daniel Berger missed the cut. Craig is quietly having a strong US Open.

participants.name: Stephen Roberts
participants.blurb: Fitzpatrick T2, Morikawa 6th, McNealy T11, Ben Griffin T34, Gary Woodland T11. Cam Smith missed the cut. Five players in the weekend field — one of the best active rosters left.

participants.name: Nigel Coleclough
participants.blurb: JT T7, Ben Griffin T34, Matsuyama T60, Spieth T46. JJ Spaun and Jake Knapp both missed the cut. Still 31st in your own Cup, Nigel. JT is at least making it interesting.

participants.name: Hugh Cooper Jr.
participants.blurb: Xander T2, Fitzpatrick T2, Akshay Bhatia T11, Corey Conners T22. Patrick Reed and Si Woo Kim both missed the cut. Two co-leaders and two others inside the top 25 — quietly the best card in the bottom half of the draw.

participants.name: Dionne Delesalle
participants.blurb: Collin Morikawa 6th, Justin Rose T22. Jason Day WD, Adam Scott, Nicolai Hojgaard and Daniel Berger all missed the cut. Morikawa and Rose are doing the heavy lifting.

participants.name: Ted Reid
participants.blurb: JT T7, Tommy Fleetwood T22, Jordan Spieth T46, Robert MacIntyre T60. Harris English and Patrick Reed both missed the cut. JT is your guy — lean in.

participants.name: Rob Snowden
participants.blurb: Collin Morikawa 6th, Cameron Young T34, Gary Woodland T11. Jake Knapp, Si Woo Kim and Matt McCarty all missed the cut. Morikawa is putting in work — finally something to cheer about.

participants.name: Mark Kaufmann
participants.blurb: Xander T2, Tyrrell Hatton T34, Corey Conners T22, Brian Harman T11. Harris English and Robert MacIntyre both missed the cut. Four players in the weekend field.

participants.name: Mark Trotzuk
participants.blurb: Justin Rose T22, Kurt Kitayama T34. Jason Day WD, Shane Lowry, JJ Spaun and Ryan Gerard all missed the cut. Rose and Kitayama carrying a decimated roster.

participants.name: Jamie Finkbeiner
participants.blurb: Xander T2, Cameron Young T34, Akshay Bhatia T11, Corey Conners T22. Sepp Straka and Alex Noren both missed the cut. Four weekend players including a co-leader.

participants.name: Bryson Milley
participants.blurb: Morikawa 6th, Tommy Fleetwood T22, Keegan Bradley T22. Patrick Cantlay, Cam Smith and Max Homa all missed the cut. Three live players including Morikawa firing on all cylinders.

participants.name: JP Wright
participants.blurb: Tyrrell Hatton T34, Maverick McNealy T11, Jordan Spieth T46, Gary Woodland T11. Bryson and Brooks both missed the cut. The LIV power package delivered nothing — Maverick McNealy is your unexpected hero.

participants.name: Stu Louie
participants.blurb: Xander T2, Akshay Bhatia T11, Jordan Spieth T46. Brooks Koepka, Min Woo Lee and Nicolai Hojgaard all missed the cut. Xander is the only reason to watch — and what a reason.

participants.name: Aaron Watson
participants.blurb: Tommy Fleetwood T22, Sungjae Im T34, Nico Echavarria T60. Jon Rahm, Shane Lowry and Viktor Hovland all missed the cut. This is a different roster than the one Aaron drafted.

participants.name: Darren Moscovitch
participants.blurb: Sam Burns T7, Ludvig Aberg T22, Akshay Bhatia T11, Corey Conners T22. Sepp Straka and Viktor Hovland both missed the cut. Four live players — a quietly solid weekend setup.

participants.name: Chris Morrison
participants.blurb: Tommy Fleetwood T22, Sahith Theegala T7, Russell Henley T46. Patrick Reed, Adam Scott and Sepp Straka all missed the cut. Theegala is the surprise horse — and he's T7.

participants.name: James Patillo
participants.blurb: Wyndham Clark leads the tournament at -7 and James is 45th. The paradox continues. Viktor Hovland, Min Woo Lee, Shane Lowry and Daniel Berger all missed the cut. Ludvig Aberg T22 is your only other hope.

participants.name: Chris MacDougall
participants.blurb: Cameron Young T34, Akshay Bhatia T11, Robert MacIntyre T60, Bridgeman T60. Shane Lowry and Jake Knapp both missed the cut. Four players still standing after the PGA basement performance.

participants.name: Kevin Spooner
participants.blurb: Brian Harman T11, Hideki Matsuyama T60. Bryson, Patrick Reed, Min Woo Lee and Si Woo Kim all missed the cut. Harman is your only contender — and he's playing well.

participants.name: Geoff Stollery
participants.blurb: Fitzpatrick T2, Ludvig Aberg T22, Sahith Theegala T7, Akshay Bhatia T11, Ryo Hisatsune T11. Nicolai Hojgaard missed the cut. Five of six in the weekend field — one of the best roster survival rates in the pool.

participants.name: Chris Gibbins
participants.blurb: Keegan Bradley T22, Jordan Spieth T46, Michael Kim T46. Bryson, Jason Day WD and Patrick Cantlay all gone. At least three players made the weekend — more than can be said for David Puddicombe.

participants.name: Fraser Reid
participants.blurb: Tommy Fleetwood T22, Keegan Bradley T22. Harris English, JJ Spaun, Patrick Cantlay and Max Homa all missed the cut. Two players, two hopes — not ideal but not zero.

participants.name: Chris Ellison
participants.blurb: Morikawa 6th, Tommy Fleetwood T22, Joaquin Niemann T46. Shane Lowry and Alex Noren both missed the cut. Stephan Jaeger not in field. Morikawa is the engine.

participants.name: Tim Kehler
participants.blurb: Fitzpatrick T2, Ben Griffin T34, Keegan Bradley T22. JJ Spaun, Alex Noren and Ryan Gerard all missed the cut. Fitzpatrick as a co-leader is the best news this card has had all season.

participants.name: Theo Ong
participants.blurb: Fitzpatrick T2, Bridgeman T60. JJ Spaun, Jake Knapp, Si Woo Kim and Rickie Fowler all missed the cut. Fitzpatrick is carrying the entire team on his back.

participants.name: Russell Ball
participants.blurb: Maverick McNealy T11, Gotterup T60, Bridgeman T60. Bryson, Nicolai Hojgaard and Rasmus Hojgaard all missed the cut. McNealy is the only card worth flipping to.

participants.name: Tom Puddicombe
participants.blurb: JT T7, Tommy Fleetwood T22, Sungjae Im T34, Robert MacIntyre T60. Adam Scott and Sepp Straka both missed the cut. Four players alive and JT in the top ten — the best US Open setup on this card all year.

participants.name: Chris Smiley
participants.blurb: Dead last. Akshay Bhatia made the cut at T11 — your lone survivor. Bryson, Brooks, Min Woo Lee, Jason Day WD, Marco Penge not in field. One player, 56th place. The only direction is up.
